title: polypodium fasciatum
intro: Polypodium fasciatum, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, classified under the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect the skin from damage caused by UV radiation. The health benefits of Polypodium fasciatum include its potential to reduce the risk of skin cancer, improve skin elasticity, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polypodium fasciatum are often available in the form of capsules, creams, and serums, and can be used topically or taken orally for their medicinal properties.
